channel.title: Azure Foundry on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Foundry on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Bring your own AI Gateway in Foundry Agent Service
item.description:
Foundry Agent Service now supports bring-your-own-model scenarios. Agents can use AI models deployed outside Foundry, including models behind enterprise AI gateways such as Azure API Management.

  • Source: Azure Updates
